landing.title: Attentive | AI-Powered SMS and Email Marketing Platform
landing.text:
Attentive | AI-Powered SMS and Email Marketing Platform
Consent
Details
[#IABV2SETTINGS#]
About
This website uses cookies
We use third-party cookies and tracking technologies on our website to deliver relevant advertising, perform site analytics, and provide the best possible experience. These third parties may use your information for their own purposes.
By clicking Accept,
you consent to our use of such technologies. For more information, see our
Privacy Policy
and
Cookie Notice
[#GPC_BANNER_ICON#]
[#GPC_TOAST_TEXT#]
Consent Selection
Necessary
Preferences
Statistics
Marketing
Show details
Details
Necessary
57
Necessary cookies help make a website usable by enabling basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.
Chilipiper
3
Learn more about this provider
dmn_chk_# [x2]
Used to maintain the overall functionality of the website: Assigns the user to a server and detects potential errors on specific servers, allowing the website to reassign the users to another server.

: HTTP Cookie

[#IABV2SETTINGS#]

This website uses cookies

docs.title: Introduction to Attentive APIs
docs.text:
Introduction to Attentive APIs
For AI agents: visit https://docs.attentive.com/llms.txt for an index of all pages formatted in Markdown and endpoints in OpenAPI.
Jump to Content
Guides
API Reference
Log In
Guides
Search
⌘K
Log In
Guides
API Reference
Introduction to Attentive APIs
Getting Started
Introduction to Attentive APIs
Partner with Attentive
Authentication
Create and Manage Custom Apps
Distribute Your App
Publish Your App
Attentive SSO Setup - SAML
API Rate Limits
API Testing Console
Webhooks
Webhooks Overview
Webhook Authentication
Create and Manage Webhooks
Best Practices
Webhook Payloads
Developer Guides
SDKs
Attentive Tag SDK
Google Tag Manager SDK
GTM SDK via Attentive Analytics Template
Mobile SDKs
SFTP Solution
Attentive SFTP Data Feeds
Connect to Attentive SFTP
Daasity SFTP
Event Data Field Definitions
Optimove Segments
Subscriber Segment Upload
Integrations
Getting Started
Introduction to Attentive APIs
Introduction
Attentive’s APIs allow you as a developer to integrate with the Attentive platform and build custom applications. Use our numerous endpoints to manage user subscriptions, trigger messages related to user actions, save subscriber attributes, and send personalized text messages.
Attentive APIs
Our APIs return JSON-encoded responses and use standard HTTP response codes, authentication, and verbs. We provide descriptions, parameter definitions, and code examples to help explain each endpoint. You can also
download our OpenAPI specification
at any time.
Webhooks
You can use the Attentive platform or our APIs to configure webhook subscriptions for desired events. For example, you can receive a notification when a user subscribes to receive SMS marketing or transactional messages. The webhook takes information about the subscriber and sends it as a payload to the registered endpoint. See
Webhooks
for more information.
Legacy APIs
While some developers continue to use our legacy APIs, we recommend using the Attentive APIs, which contain more functionality and beneficial features available to your organization. Note that legacy APIs require different access tokens than Attentive APIs. You must contact
legacyapi@attentivemobile.com
to obtain legacy API tokens.
Build applications
Learn how to
create a custom app
and then
make it publicly available
for other users outside of your organization to install in their Attentive account. Applications use OAuth 2.0 protocol to ensure that users must authorize your application to make API requests without sharing any passwords.
Developer guides
The Developer Guides section includes details about more technical parts of our product, such as how to implement the Attentive tag to capture behavioral data on your website, the different types of data feeds that we can provide, and the various integrations that we’ve built with supported third-party partners.
Updated
3 months ago
Partner with Attentive
Did this page help you?
Yes
No
Copy Page
Introduction
Resources
Blog
Guides
Webinars
API License
Company
About us
Contact us
Careers
© 2026 Attentive, a product of Attentive Mobile, Inc.

analysis.name: Attentive
analysis.tagline: AI-Powered SMS and Email Marketing Platform
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered SMS and email marketing platform that helps brands grow revenue through personalized mobile messaging.
analysis.ideal_customer: E-commerce and retail brands seeking to drive revenue through SMS and email marketing with AI personalization

features.name: sms marketing
features.description: Send personalized SMS marketing campaigns to subscribers

features.name: email marketing
features.evidence_quote: AI-Powered SMS and Email Marketing Platform

features.name: subscriber management
features.description: Manage user subscriptions and subscriber attributes via API or UI
features.evidence_quote: manage user subscriptions... save subscriber attributes

features.name: triggered messaging
features.description: Trigger messages based on user actions and behavioral events
features.evidence_quote: trigger messages related to user actions

features.name: rest api
features.description: JSON REST API for building custom integrations with Attentive platform
features.evidence_quote: Our APIs return JSON-encoded responses and use standard HTTP response codes

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Webhook subscriptions for platform events such as new subscriber signups
features.evidence_quote: configure webhook subscriptions for desired events... when a user subscribes to receive SMS marketing

features.name: sso (saml)
features.description: SAML-based single sign-on for enterprise authentication

features.name: oauth 2.0 app platform
features.description: Build and distribute third-party apps using OAuth 2.0 against Attentive APIs
features.evidence_quote: Applications use OAuth 2.0 protocol to ensure that users must authorize your application

features.name: custom app creation
features.description: Developers can create and publish custom apps for the Attentive ecosystem
features.evidence_quote: create a custom app and then make it publicly available for other users outside of your organization

features.name: attentive tag sdk
features.description: JavaScript tag for capturing behavioral data on merchant websites
features.evidence_quote: how to implement the Attentive tag to capture behavioral data on your website

features.name: google tag manager sdk
features.description: GTM-native SDK for deploying Attentive tag via Google Tag Manager

features.name: mobile sdks
features.description: Native mobile SDKs for iOS and Android to support in-app messaging

features.name: sftp data feeds
features.description: SFTP-based data export feeds for subscriber and event data

features.name: subscriber segment upload
features.description: Upload subscriber segments via file or integration for targeted sends

features.name: api rate limiting
features.description: Enforced API rate limits with documented thresholds for developer integrations

features.name: api testing console
features.description: In-platform API testing console for developers to validate requests

features.name: ai-powered personalization
